strategies.display_name: BTC Managed Exposure Daily Core Paper v1
strategies.description: Promote the risk-adjusted managed BTC core first, while the tactical overlay remains research-only until a 4H scheduler is ready.
notes: Passive manifest registration for passport convergence; this record is not eligible for the singleton active runtime slot until the strategy bank becomes sleeve-aware.
This manifest intentionally promotes the daily graduated core, not the tactical overlay.
The bench evidence comes from the q090c managed-exposure finalist package.
Future 4H crypto execution should promote a second manifest instead of mutating this one in place.
Hydrate q090c into the bank from Linux side to unblock crypto passport workflow fields

strategies.display_name: BTC Managed Exposure Daily Core Persistent Floor Paper v1
strategies.description: Promote the managed BTC core with a 10% risk-off floor so the crypto sleeve stays partially deployed while preserving the risk-adjusted managed-exposure story; tactical overlay remains research-only.
notes: Passive manifest registration for passport convergence; this record is not eligible for the singleton active runtime slot until the strategy bank becomes sleeve-aware.
This manifest intentionally promotes the daily graduated core with a small persistent risk-off floor, not the tactical overlay.
The bench evidence comes from the q090d managed-exposure persistent-floor finalist package.
Future 4H crypto execution should promote a second manifest instead of mutating this one in place.
Hydrate q090d into the bank alongside q090c

strategies.description: Middle ground between the tighter stop and the looser stop while nudging the target earlier.
notes: Current research leader.
The frozen winner is stop_5_target_15 and should not be retuned on the same 2022-01-01 through 2026-03-31 tape.
The frozen confirmation preset intentionally uses the six-name optimized sleeve: AAPL, AVGO, COST, LLY, META, NVDA.
Benchmark SPY return over the test span: 80.45%
Benchmark rationale: SPY remains the correct market baseline for a broad long-only momentum sleeve that rotates among liquid large-cap equities.
Benchmark comparison mode: both
Exposure profile: 81.20% of evaluated trading days active, 36.03% average capital deployed, 85.94% peak capital deployed.
Deployment-matched benchmark SPY return: 45.89% (excess 44.88%).
Risk-adjusted summary: annualized return 22.69%, annualized volatility 11.23%, Sharpe 1.88, Sortino 3.06, Calmar 2.49.
The strategy cleared the minimum thresholds for profit factor, expectancy, fold consistency, drawdown, benchmark comparison, and sample-quality gates.

gates.label: Minimum trade count
gates.summary: Completed-trade floor required before a decisive verdict is allowed.

gates.summary: Gross-profit-to-gross-loss ratio for the full chained run.

gates.label: Expectancy per trade
gates.summary: Average PnL per trade across the full chained run.

gates.label: Profitable folds
gates.summary: Percent of folds that closed positive.

gates.label: Max drawdown bound
gates.summary: Maximum chained drawdown allowed for a promotable edge.

gates.label: Beats benchmark
gates.summary: Strategy return cleared the configured benchmark comparison mode.

gates.label: Expectancy decay
gates.summary: Second-half expectancy stayed within the allowed decay envelope.

gates.label: Held-out window
gates.summary: The held-out window confirmed positive return and expectancy.
